entities.name: Pub/Sub API
entities.context: API that allows for messaging between applications

entities.name: Pub/Sub topic
entities.context: A mechanism for categorizing messages in the Pub/Sub system

entities.name: Drive folder
entities.context: A storage location in Google Drive

entities.name: Zo webhook endpoint
entities.context: An endpoint for receiving HTTP requests for integration

entities.name: reflection-auto-ingest
entities.context: A process triggered upon file addition

relationships.context: Google Workspace Events API is used in conjunction with Pub/Sub API
Drive folder changes are related to the Pub/Sub topic
Events from the topic are forwarded to Zo webhook
File additions in the Drive folder trigger reflection-auto-ingest
